step_by_step_thinking:
For teeth with nonvital pulps and associated sinus issues, curettage would effectively clean out infected material and promote healing while maintaining anatomical integrity. Thus, option C (\boxed{C}) seems best suited.
\boxed{C} Based on the available evidence focusing on thorough cleaning and promoting healing over immediate cauterization or complex procedures, curettage appears the most appropriate initial step in managing such cases.
